channel.title: Journal of Basic and Clinical Physiology and Pharmacology
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Basic and Clinical Physiology and Pharmacology

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Rafal Sameer Al-Abboody, Nadia Heydari, Mohsen Saravani, Shahin Nosaratzehi, Hamideh Akbari, Seyyed Mehdi Jafari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbcpp-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Quality by design: how poor adherence to guidelines holds back urological app innovation
item.description: Article by Rafal Sameer Al-Abboody, Nadia Heydari, Mohsen Saravani, Shahin Nosaratzehi, Hamideh Akbari, Seyyed Mehdi Jafari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbcpp-2024-0205

item.title: Efficacy and safety of resmetirom in MASLD and MASH: network meta-analysis of randomized clinical trials
item.description: Article by Rafal Sameer Al-Abboody, Nadia Heydari, Mohsen Saravani, Shahin Nosaratzehi, Hamideh Akbari, Seyyed Mehdi Jafari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbcpp-2024-0140

item.title: Exploring the therapeutic potential of GLP-1 receptor agonists in the management of obstructive sleep apnea: a comprehensive review
item.description: Article by Rafal Sameer Al-Abboody, Nadia Heydari, Mohsen Saravani, Shahin Nosaratzehi, Hamideh Akbari, Seyyed Mehdi Jafari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbcpp-2024-0193

item.title: A cross-sectional study on the effects of physical activity on hand grip strength in type 2 diabetes mellitus patients
item.description: Article by Rafal Sameer Al-Abboody, Nadia Heydari, Mohsen Saravani, Shahin Nosaratzehi, Hamideh Akbari, Seyyed Mehdi Jafari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbcpp-2024-0176

item.title: A cross sectional study on effect of glycaemic status and duration of type II diabetes mellitus on the pulmonary function
item.description: Article by Rafal Sameer Al-Abboody, Nadia Heydari, Mohsen Saravani, Shahin Nosaratzehi, Hamideh Akbari, Seyyed Mehdi Jafari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbcpp-2024-0190

item.title: Risk factor assessment for post-thrombolytic coronary angiogram normalcy in young myocardial infarction patients
item.description: Article by Rafal Sameer Al-Abboody, Nadia Heydari, Mohsen Saravani, Shahin Nosaratzehi, Hamideh Akbari, Seyyed Mehdi Jafari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbcpp-2024-0064

item.title: Evaluation of the serum level of CTRP-3 and CTRP-6 in patients with Hashimoto’s disease and correlation with thyroid hormones and lipid profile
item.description: Article by Rafal Sameer Al-Abboody, Nadia Heydari, Mohsen Saravani, Shahin Nosaratzehi, Hamideh Akbari, Seyyed Mehdi Jafari DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbcpp-2024-0060
